title: gahnia teretifolia
intro: Gahnia teretifolia, also known as the Yellow Flag Sedge, is a plant species within the family Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gahnia teretifolia include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas and infusions, and it can also be found in some commercial skincare products.
